auth.optional: Access is public. Sign in only if you want to save your scores in the cloud.
auth.title: Account
auth.subtitle: Sign in to save your progress
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox to confirm your account.
auth.magicLinkDescription: We will send a one-time sign-in link to that email address.
auth.magicLinkRequiresEmail: Enter your email before requesting a magic link.
auth.magicLinkSent: If an account exists for that email, we have sent a sign-in link.
auth.passwordRecoveryDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.passwordResetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, we have sent a recovery link.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter a new password to complete the recovery flow.
auth.resetPasswordSessionMissing: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the login page.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
auth.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated successfully.
auth.finishingGoogleDescription: We are completing your Google sign-in. You will be redirected shortly.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.description: Before continuing, we need a few details to create your public arithmetix profile.
onboarding.loadingDescription: We are checking whether you already have a saved profile.
onboarding.accountEmailHint: This is the email you used to sign up or sign in.
onboarding.aliasHint: Required. Use 3 to 24 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, underscore, or hyphen.
onboarding.aliasRequired: You need to choose an alias.
onboarding.aliasInvalid: The alias is invalid. Use 3 to 24 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, underscore, or hyphen.
onboarding.aliasTaken: That alias is already taken. Choose another one.
onboarding.birthYearInvalid: Birth year must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself or how you use arithmetix.
onboarding.genericError: The profile could not be saved. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: These are the details currently stored for your arithmetix account.
profile.editDescription: Here you can update your bio, education center, city, and country.
